description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in full military camouflage attire, including a helmet, long-sleeved shirt, and pants. The individual is equipped with a dark protective vest and gloves, and is wearing sturdy boots suitable for rugged environments. The face is painted with camouflage stripes, enhancing concealment in urban or woodland settings. The uniform features a pixelated camouflage pattern, and the helmet matches the rest of the outfit. The figure stands with arms extended horizontally, displaying a disciplined and alert posture typical of military personnel.
description: An adult in full military camouflage gear with helmet, vest, gloves, and boots, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has face paint and a matching patterned uniform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with camouflage paint, full uniform, vest, gloves, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, vest, and the straight arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, vest, and the camouflage pattern on the uniform.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the helmet, vest, and the straight arm.
attribute_clothing_type: military uniform with protective vest, helmet, and gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
